find_neighbors(p_user_id uuid, p_node_id.return_type: TABLE(node_id text, name text, source_type text, summary text, tags text[], url text, depth integer, path text[])

hybrid_kg_search(query_text text, query_.return_type: TABLE(node_id text, name text, source_type text, summary text, tags text[], url text, rrf_score double precision)

isolated_nodes(p_user_id uuid).return_type: TABLE(node_id text, name text, source_type text, url text, node_date date)

match_kg_nodes(query_embedding vector, m.return_type: TABLE(id text, name text, source_type text, summary text, tags text[], url text, similarity double precision)

rag_bandit_read_arms(p_user_id uuid, p_k.return_type: TABLE(seed_arm numeric, seed_alpha numeric, seed_beta numeric, seed_total_pulls integer, bandit_disabled_at timestamp with time zone)

rag_dense_recall(p_user_id uuid, p_effec.return_type: TABLE(kind text, node_id text, chunk_id uuid, chunk_idx integer, name text, source_type text, url text, content text, tags text[], rrf_score double precision)

rag_fetch_anchor_seeds(p_sandbox_id uuid.return_type: TABLE(node_id text, chunk_id uuid, chunk_idx integer, kind text, name text, source_type text, url text, content text, tags text[], score double precision)

rag_hybrid_search(p_user_id uuid, p_quer.return_type: TABLE(kind text, node_id text, chunk_id uuid, chunk_idx integer, name text, source_type text, url text, content text, tags text[], metadata jsonb, rrf_score double precision)

rag_subgraph_for_pagerank(p_user_id uuid.return_type: TABLE(source_node_id text, target_node_id text, weight integer)

similar_nodes(p_user_id uuid, p_node_id.return_type: TABLE(node_id text, name text, source_type text, shared_tags text[], overlap_count bigint)

top_connected_nodes(p_user_id uuid, p_li.return_type: TABLE(node_id text, name text, source_type text, degree bigint)

top_tags(p_user_id uuid, p_limit integer.return_type: TABLE(tag text, frequency bigint, node_count bigint)
